positive: Minimalist line art design featuring a majestic mountain range silhouette against a rising sun. The foreground features abstract, geometric elements representing forest flora (ferns, stylized leaves) and a flowing river curve. Style: Japanese Ukiyo-e meets Scandinavian folk art, using clean, continuous black linework with strategic areas of solid color fill (pastel ochre, teal, and burnt orange). Composition: Central and symmetrical, ideal for full-chest placement on apparel. Lighting: High contrast, flat vector graphic look. Details: Intricate yet readable; perfect for screen printing or vinyl application. Rule of Thirds applied to the horizon line.
negative: blurry, amateur, text, watermark, signature, logo, typography, jpeg artifacts, cropped, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, grain, bokeh
